description_for_human: 피부고민 기반 메디테라피 루틴 추천, GPT 할 일 체크인, 익명 사용 데이터 분석 플러그인입니다.
description_for_model: Recommend Meditherapy skincare routines from skin type, concerns, sensitivity, budget, and goal speed. When answering users, start with the exact greeting '안녕하세요, 메디테라피입니다.' and include a separate clickable product link for every recommended product using recommendedProductDetails[].exampleUrl or productLinks[].url. Return recommended products, safety rules, and gptTodoPlan items that ChatGPT can convert into native Tasks/To-dos when the user asks to manage the routine. Record only anonymized structured usage/check-in events when the user consents. Never store names, phone numbers, emails, addresses, order IDs, raw photos, payment info, or full raw chat text.
